summary: Backend API testing for Collaboration & Permission Rules - All 19 tests PASSED. Tested appointment system, messaging permissions, birth plan visibility controls, and midwife visit data filtering.
critical_code_review_comments: ClientCreate model does not include linked_mom_id field - midwife must update client after creation to link with Mom user account
Birth plan is created lazily when Mom first accesses /api/birth-plan - providers may not see shared plan until Mom has accessed her birth plan at least once

test_credentials.note: Each test class creates unique test users with timestamps to avoid conflicts

seed_data_creation: Test users created dynamically during test execution with unique email formats like test_mom_{timestamp}@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: All collaboration and permission rules are working correctly. The test suite covers the complete flow from user registration, connection establishment (share request/accept), appointments, messaging, and data visibility rules.

tests: Doula/Midwife can create appointment with connected Mom
Appointment creation fails without active connection (403)
Mom sees appointments WITHOUT provider's private notes
Provider sees appointments WITH private notes
Shared birth plan list includes read_only=True flag
Shared birth plan detail includes read_only=True and can_add_notes=True
Doula and Midwife sharing common client CAN message each other
Providers without common client CANNOT message each other (403)
Mom sees only: visit_id, visit_date, visit_type, gestational_age, summary_for_mom, created_at
Mom does NOT see: blood_pressure, weight, fetal_heart_rate, private_note
All 9 birth plan sections can be completed
Completion triggers birth_plan_complete notification to connected providers
Notification includes title 'Birth Plan Complete' and message with mom's name

test_flow_summary.connection_setup: Mom creates share_request -> Provider sees pending request -> Provider accepts -> Connection active
test_flow_summary.appointment_flow: Provider creates appointment (includes private notes) -> Mom sees appointment (without notes) -> Mom responds (accept/decline)
test_flow_summary.messaging_flow: Verified bidirectional Mom<->Provider messaging with connection check, and Provider<->Provider messaging with shared client check
